release_notes: iPos Sync Agent v0.5.12 moves the entire update flow into the Dashboard "Update Tersedia" popup - download progress and install now happen there without switching tabs, and the redundant DOWNLOAD UPDATE / BATALKAN DOWNLOAD / INSTALL UPDATE controls have been removed from Settings (PERIKSA UPDATE stays for a manual check). No changes to sync logic, pricing, or the Batch API/STOP SYNC/index fixes from v0.5.11.
